build_system: pip with requirements.txt, Docker multi-stage build
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio, uses mock spaCy models and mocked API calls
verification_instructions: 1. Install deps with pip install -r requirements.txt. 2. Run python -m pytest tests/ -v. 3. Verify imports work with python -c 'from src.extractors.local_extractor import LocalExtractor'
setup_instructions: pyenv shell 3.11.14 && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access. Python 3.11 via pyenv. No Docker daemon available for docker build validation. New heavy ML deps (torch, transformers, paddleocr) should be optional imports with graceful fallback.
contribution_requirements: Tests use mocked models (no real GPU/model downloads needed in tests). All new models must have graceful degradation if not installed.
key_patterns: BaseExtractor abstract class in src/extractors/base.py defines extract() and get_confidence() interface. LocalExtractor uses spaCy + regex. APIExtractor uses openai.AsyncOpenAI client with retry logic. Settings loaded from config/settings.yaml via pydantic-settings in src/utils/config.py. ConfidenceReport and ConfidenceScore models in src/models/confidence.py. Tests mock spaCy docs and API calls.
directory_structure: src/extractors/ - extraction mode implementations. src/processors/ - document format processors and OCR. src/models/ - pydantic data models. src/utils/ - config, audit, webhooks. src/agent/ - orchestrator and action engine. src/industry/ - domain-specific analyzers. api/ - FastAPI routes. config/ - YAML configs. tests/ - pytest test suite.
